title: cocculus glaucus
intro: Cocculus glaucus, also known as the parasol nut, is a plant species that belongs to the family Menispermaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. The health benefits of Cocculus glaucus include its ability to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation, as well as its potential to improve sleep quality. Cocculus glaucus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, tinctures, and teas, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
